evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D28 Mission Report East China Sea 2024
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D28 Mission Report East China Sea 2024 Misrep undefined-10431840 Narrative (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) DEPARTED OKAS AT 1740Z TO CONDUCT ARMED OVERWATCH IVO 38SKC63 2 (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON STATION AT APPROXIMATELY 1930Z AND CHECKED IN WITH PERFORMED A WEAPONS CALIBRATION, HAVING RELEASED 20x105mm, 101x30mm, 1xAGM-176. 's CREW OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENA DURING ITS PGM SHOT (SEE UAP 1). WAS CLEARED OFF STATION AT 2323Z. GFC INTENT MET. LANDED AT OKAS AT 0046Z. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490921 OPERATION - Operation: INHERENT RESOLVE - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCENTCOM MSGID - Report Type:

's CREW OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENA DURING ITS PGM SHOT (SEE UAP 1). WAS CLEARED OFF STATION AT 2323Z. GFC INTENT MET. LANDED AT OKAS AT 0046Z. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490921 OPERATION - Operation: INHERENT RESOLVE - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCENTCOM MSGID - Report Type:

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023 AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS. (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: NOFORN - Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS - Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606 OPERATION - Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL - Domain: AIR - Operations Center: 609th USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 - Major Command (MAJCOM): AFSOC - Combatant Command (COCOM): USCEN
